chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ جَهِلَ أَنْ يَقِفَ بِالْمَشْعَرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 169 – The one who is ignorant that he should be pausing at the Monuments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/134)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/134)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

text: فِي رَجُلٍ لَمْ يَقِفْ بِالْمُزْدَلِفَةِ وَ لَمْ يَبِتْ بِهَا حَتَّى أَتَى مِنًى فَقَالَ أَ لَمْ يَرَ النَّاسَ وَ لَمْ يُنْكِرْ مِنًى حِينَ دَخَلَهَا قُلْتُ فَإِنْ جَهِلَ ذَلِكَ قَالَ يَرْجِعُ قُلْتُ إِنَّ ذَلِكَ قَدْ فَاتَهُ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muhammad Bin Yahya Al Khas’amy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said regarding a man who did not pause at Al-Muzdalifa, and did not sleep at it until he went to Mina. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Did he not see the people and did not deny (that he was in) Mina when he entered it?’ I said, ‘Supposing he was ignorant of that’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should return’. I said, ‘If that (opportunity) has been lost?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Khath’amiy who has said the following: “About a man who had not stayed in al-Muzdalifah and did not pass the night there until he arrived in Mina’, he (the Imam) asked, ‘Did he not see the people and recognize Mina 5 when he arrived ? 5 I then asked, ‘What happens if he is ignorant about it ?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘He must go back.’ I then said, ‘He has missed such chance .’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not harmful .’”
